resources.string: Checking connection and credentials. This may take a moment on slow networks.
Rewinds 15 seconds when pausing, so playback resumes with a short recap.
Signs this vehicle in to your Audiobookshelf server.
Removes session and credentials from this vehicle.
Loads catalog and recently listened books from the server.
Update not possible. The last catalog remains available.
Removes catalog data, cover art, audio cache, and locally cached progress. The login remains saved.
Creates a ZIP with app diagnostics and uploads it.
How ShelfDrive stores and uses app data.

ShelfDrive connects to the Audiobookshelf server you enter in Settings. Credentials are stored encrypted on this device. Catalog data, cover art, playback state, and listening progress are synchronized with your server.

ShelfDrive stores the server URL, username, encrypted password or session token, local catalog metadata, cover art, playback state, listening progress, cache data, diagnostics state, diagnostics upload URL, and app settings on this device.

ShelfDrive connects to the Audiobookshelf server URL configured by you to sign in, load the catalog, stream audio, load artwork, and synchronize listening progress. The app does not include ads, analytics SDKs, tracking SDKs, or developer-operated content services.

ShelfDrive does not sell user data and does not share user data with advertising or analytics providers. If you explicitly send diagnostics, a diagnostic package is sent to the diagnostics upload URL shown in Settings.

You can remove account/session data by logging out. You can remove cached catalog, artwork, audio cache, and locally cached progress with Clear cache or by clearing app data in Android settings.
Project status, affiliation, and usage responsibility.

ShelfDrive is an independent project and is not affiliated with Audiobookshelf.

ShelfDrive does not provide audiobooks, catalogs, hosting, network access, VPN, reverse proxy, or server management. You are responsible for your Audiobookshelf server, your login credentials, your network setup, and the content available through your server.

Configure the app only when it is safe and legal to do so. Follow your vehicle system rules and local traffic laws.

ShelfDrive is provided without a guarantee of uninterrupted availability, compatibility with every Android Automotive OS vehicle, or protection against server, network, cache, or playback failures.

ShelfDrive will create a ZIP package with app diagnostics and upload it to the diagnostics upload URL shown in Settings. The package may include app logs, app version, device/runtime details, connection and sync status, cache status, restore status, and error messages. It does not include your saved password.\n\nSend diagnostics only if you want to share this information with the recipient of the shown upload URL.
The last successful catalog remains available.
Server is currently unreachable. Content may be outdated.
Server is unreachable. The last catalog remains available.
Session expired. Please sign in again.
Server version %1$s could not be parsed cleanly.
Audiobookshelf %1$s is not supported in v1. Version 2.31.0 or newer is required.
URL, username, and password are required.
Login response did not include an access token.
Refresh response did not include an access token.
Server is unreachable or returned an invalid response.
Server URL must start with https://.
Server URL does not contain a host.
Server URL must not include credentials.
Server URL must not include query parameters or fragments.
HTTP is not allowed. Use HTTPS.
This account request is not supported.
Please sign in again from Settings.
Please check the connection in Settings.
The catalog is currently loading from the server.
Audiobooks started on the server will appear here.
The current sync does not contain playable audiobooks yet.
No authors are available in the current catalog yet.
The selected author is no longer available in the local catalog.
There are currently no playable audiobooks for this author in the catalog.
